appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/user-testing.md` to remove stale Hermes/ASCII validation expectations and align immersive validation guidance with the approved shader-plus-film-grain stack.

Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` to remove outdated Hermes/ASCII environment notes and record the current approved visual stack as one Radiant-derived shader plus a vendored film-grain GIF overlay.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception path for test-only cleanup features so failing-test-first and browser-validation requirements only apply when the feature changes rendered user behavior or runtime code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `redesign-final-ascii-terminology-purge-from-all-tests` found the worker had to mark justified deviations because the feature only rewrote test assertions and terminology, yet the skill still requires failing-test-first plus `agent-browser` validation for all frontend tasks.
